description_long: This is a compact, black mechanical keyboard with a tenkeyless layout, omitting the numeric keypad for a smaller footprint. The keyboard features a standard set of alphanumeric keys, function keys, and a set of navigation keys, all with white printed legends. The keycaps are slightly contoured and appear to be made of durable plastic, while the chassis is low-profile and rectangular with a matte finish. The underside is not visible, but the keyboard likely has small rubber feet for stability. There are no visible cables, branding, or additional features such as wrist rests or macro keys.
description: A compact, black tenkeyless mechanical keyboard with white legends and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the keyboard and the arrangement of the keycaps.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth and slight contour of the keycaps.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back edge and the overall slim profile of the keyboard.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again emphasizing the keycap layout and compact design.
